title: HTML CSS & JS Job-Ready Bootcamp
subtitle: Become a Job-Ready Front-End Developer in 12 Weeks
description: Learn to build real websites, apps, and deploy live projects from scratch. Focus on responsive design, interactive JS, and production tools.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: Build your own responsive, modern portfolio site.

projects.title: Business Landing Page
projects.description: Create a highly converting, SEO friendly product landing page.

projects.title: API-Based Interactive App
projects.description: Develop a dynamic web app fetching live database info.

projects.title: Interactive Dashboard
projects.description: Build an executive admin-like dashboard using CSS grids and charts.

requirements: A laptop/PC with VS Code installed

curriculum.title: HTML, CSS & Responsive Layouts

lessons.title: Semantic HTML5 structure & SEO best practices
CSS Foundations: Flexbox, Grid, Custom Properties & Animations

curriculum.practice: Develop and style a personal responsive portfolio landing page
curriculum.outcome: Can build structured, beautiful, and fully responsive static websites.

curriculum.title: JavaScript & DOM Manipulation

lessons.title: JS Basics: Variables, Arrays, Objects, Functions & Control Flow
DOM Selection, Event listeners, and Dynamic UI modifications
Fetching external APIs, Promises, Async/Await & JSON rendering

curriculum.practice: Build a real-time weather or movie search app fetching external data
curriculum.outcome: Implement logic, handle browser events, and pull API data into static pages.

curriculum.title: Advanced Projects & Git Workflow

lessons.title: Version Control with Git & Hosting on GitHub
Modern build tools & deploying sites to Vercel/Netlify
Creating clean CSS themes, light/dark modes & UX improvements

curriculum.practice: Build and deploy a fully functional multi-page Business dashboard
curriculum.outcome: Deploy interactive applications live to production using git version control.

curriculum.title: Capstone Project & Career Preparation

lessons.title: Designing and developing a custom Capstone application
Mock interviews, Resume review & Freelance job hunting templates

curriculum.practice: Complete your developer portfolio and apply for entry-level roles
curriculum.outcome: Become a job-ready Front-End Developer with a strong, published portfolio.

features: Learn DOM, APIs, and modern ES6+ JS by building things
Get portfolio deployment and hosting training using Git
Get career outcomes: Front-End Developer, Freelance Web Developer, UI Developer
